error.signature: HardFault_Handler: FORCED, bus fault at address 0x00000000

verdict.summary: ARM Cortex-M hard fault. Null pointer, stack overflow, unaligned access, or invalid memory.

dead_ends.action: Add while(1) in HardFault handler and inspect PC in debugger
dead_ends.why_fails: PC in handler points to handler itself, not faulting instruction. Read stacked PC from exception frame.

dead_ends.action: Increase heap size assuming memory allocation failure
dead_ends.why_fails: Hard faults are usually stack overflow or dangling pointers. Heap failures return NULL.

dead_ends.action: Disable fault handlers to prevent stopping
dead_ends.why_fails: Without handlers, faults escalate to lockup; processor halts until hardware reset

workarounds.action: Read stacked PC/LR from exception frame to find faulting instruction
workarounds.how: In handler: read SP, stacked_pc = *(SP+24), look up in .map file

workarounds.action: Enable BusFault, MemManage, UsageFault handlers for specific info
Check stack size and add overflow detection
workarounds.how: FreeRTOS: configCHECK_FOR_STACK_OVERFLOW=2; Bare metal: fill stack with 0xDEADBEEF
